channel.title: Maine Judicial Branch Proposed Rule Amendments
channel.description: Prose page (no repeating list structure) describing active proposed rule changes and comment deadlines; monitored by full-page fingerprint.

item.title: Monitoring started: Maine Judicial Branch Proposed Rule Amendments
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
